feature.label: JHappyLoveAnyFeature
feature.description:
JHappyLoveAny is a Language Server Protocol
(LSP) based plugin for the Eclipse IDE that provides powerful auto-completion and navigation for keys defined in .properties and .xml directly within Java source code. It eliminates the hassle of searching for key definitions manually, significantly boosting coding productivity https://github.com/Tatoo2018/JHappyLoveAny
feature.copyright: Copyright (c) 2026 Tatoo2018. All rights reserved. This offering is made available under the terms of the MIT License.
